titleStmt.title: SII 20.202: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 202. (B.K. No. 53 of 1936-37.) KALKĒRI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in the temple called Mallayyana Guḍi.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1167, Krōdhi, Bhādrapada, śu. 14, Sunday. The date is irregular. Taking the Śaka year to be current (Krōdhin), the tithi corresponds to 1244 A.D., August 18. The week day was Thursday and not Sunday as stated in the record.

This long inscription gives the genealogy of Siṅghaṇa and records gifts of lands and house-site by pradhāni Malla, Bīchaṇa and his son Pāyiseṭṭi, for the benefit of the temple of Ananta-Tīrthakara at Kalukere in Hagariṭage-nāḍu constructed by Pāyiseṭṭi, at the instance of his guru Kamaḷasēna-bhaṭṭāraka. Pāyiseṭṭi, who is stated to be the son of Nākiseṭṭi, was given in adoption to Bīchaṇa.
Hagariṭage-nāḍu, Kalukere, Bīchaṇa and his exploits, Pāyisetti and his brothers are all described at length.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyātraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . śrīmanmaṁgaḷarūpalakṣaṇamanaṁgaṁ puṣpacā
pōddhatōddāmōdyadvijayī parākramavanāṁtaṁ vastupāpastamastōmānaṁtananaṁta tīrtthakananaṁtasvāmilakṣakkatiprēmaṁ nākana sūnu vaiśyaku
ḷakaḷpasthāyyanaṁ pāyyanaṁ . vikasāṁbhōruhadaṁte ka(ṁ)ṇgesegu jaṁbūdvīpa vaṁbhōjakarṇnikeyaṁtippu
du mēruvaṁbudhiyaṁbhōjakarōruha karaṁ bharatakṣōṇi raṁjikuṁ taddakṣiṇabhāgadoḷu viṣada
lakṣmīkuṁtaḷaṁ kuṁtaḷaṁ . Āntakhiḷadharāṁganā nīḷakuṭilakuṁtaḷadaṁteseva kuṁtaḷadēśādhinātharāreṁdaḍe . Urubaḷaśāḻi yā
davakuḷāgraṇi bhillamabhūmipāḷanā narapatinaṁdanaṁ negaḷda jaitugidēvanavaṁge puṭṭidaṁ varasutanurvvarābharitabhāradhuraṁdhara
na(ṁ)nyarāyasiṁdhuramadamānasaṁharaṇa siṁhaparākrama cakri siṁghaṇaṁ . Ātana parākramaveṁteṁdaḍe . mattēbhavikrīḍitaṁ
harihēśāravadiṁ virōdhinriparaṁ beṁnnaṭṭi vidyuṣṭa rāyara saṁbhāga maneyde koṁdu tanagēkachatravāgalke dikkaribhōgīkamaṭhaśramāpahaThe correct reading seems to besaṁghāta.
raṇaṁ kāmēccheyaṁ tāḷdidaṁtire tāḷdaṁ nibiḍōru bhūribhujadoḷu bhūbhāramaṁ siṁghaṇaṁ . va . Ā pratāpacakravarti siṁ
ghaṇarāyaneṁba yādavanārāyaṇana Avatārakke tārābalaṁ Ayiśvaryyakke yāditya balaṁ caturōpāyakke caṁdrabalaṁ bhōgakke bhūbalaṁ digu
vijayōdyōgakke yōgiṇībalaṁ bhaṁḍārada bhāgyavōlagada mayisiridaśakke dīkṣāguru rājyakke rakṣāmaṇiyenisida pradhānacūḍāma
ṇigaḷāreṁdaḍe . vri . Amaḷacaritradiṁ kulahitārtha Udārateyiṁ dharātaḷakkamama hitārtha va(ṁ)nvitacaturṇnayadiṁ pati siṁha
ṇāvanīramaṇahitārtthavāgi paḍedaṁ naralōkada cikkadēvanuttama suta mallanaṁ śaciva bīceyaneṁdaḍe cakramallanaṁ . dhareyaṁ nāṁṭirevattu durggata
tiyiṁ bhaṁḍāradiṁdiṁbugoṁḍurucāturbbaḷadiṁda pallavisi rāṇīvāsavistāradiṁ caritaṁ puṣpitavāytu cikkana sutaṁ mallāṁkaniṁ bīcaniṁ paramā
rtthaṁ phalavāytu siṁghaṇanarēṁdrayiśvaryyakalpadrumaṁ . va . Aṁtavarirvvaroḷu piriyaṁ malliseṭṭi pradhānōttamana pradhānaśaktiyeṁ
teṁdaḍe . nyāyamane niṟisi caturōpāyamanodavisi nijādhipati yādavanārāyaṇana rāmarājyaśrīyaṁ peccisuvajaṁ
ge nallaṁ mallaṁ . Ātana magaṁ cāvuṁḍana mahimeyeṁteṁdaḍe . yādavarāyana rājyaśrīdarppaṇanamama bīcanabhivriddhikarōdvartta
nacaritra cauṁḍaṁ mēdinigesedaṁ pradhānakuvaranidānaṁ . Ā pradhānakuḷatiḻaka(ṁ) napratimallaṁ mallana sahōdaraṁ yādavanārā
yaṇaṁge voṁdeneya kumārakaṁṭhīravaṁ yaraḍaneya sauparṇnanuṁ mūṟeneya lalāṭa lōcanaṁ nālkaneya karaṇōdayanuṁ Ayidaneya vijayabhujādaṁḍa
nuṁ yāṟaneya cētāṁgabhūtanuṁ yēḻaneya maladhānurūpanuṁ yeṁṭaneya vibhavāṁga maṁgaḻanuṁ voṁbhattaneya yōgaprabhāvanuṁ hattane
ya bhāvarasāḻaṁkāranuṁ haṁnoṁdaneya prathamāvatāranumenisida rāyadaṁḍanātha gaṁdhavāraṇa bīcana patihitakaraprabhāvanāda viva
raveṁteṁdaḍe . negaḷdugrāhitarāyaraṁ kadanadoḷu beṁkoṁḍu saptāṁgamaṁ bage dōraṁtire taṁdu koṭṭu patigēkādriṣṭitaṁ māḍidaṁdigaḻī kāṁteya
siṁghaṇaṁ sobaganōrvvaṁ gaṁḍaneṁtoṁde sattige voṁdāṇa Enalke cikkana tanūjaṁ bīcadaṁḍādhipaṁ . Ādalladeyuṁ . Āmarddu bāgidalaṁ
dhūḻīpaṭa māḍidaṁ samarāḻōkadavāgniyeṁduripidaṁ pāṁḍyōgravāgāsiyaṁ nimirdu dōrasamudramaṁ manade goṁḍāpōśanaṁ geydanapramadiṁ
cikkana bīcagaṁ parabaḻāṁbhōrāśikuṁbhōdbhavaṁ . Asuhridbhūpagajēṁdrasiṁghaṇana hritkōpāgniyoḻu samudrāruṇavāripūrabhayadiṁ
niṁ rūḍhi pāṁḍyāvanīśaśirōjriṁbhitasāṇadolu lupu gharṇneṁbina manidaṁ cikkana bīcigaṁ digibharaṇyōdbhīkaradhvānadiṁ . Avanipa siṁha
ṇa besasalaṁ cikkana sūnu bīcanēṟuva turaga prabhūtada tadagraturu[®ka] pāṁḍya maghadhāṁgarāyarumaṁ cama
rījamanāgadāgaḷikkuva nevadiṁ sadā tāṁḍavarā mahipāḻakarāḻadhūḻiyaṁ . biruda virōdhirāyagajamastakavaṁ miduḻuṁ poyva niṣṭhuranaṁ
vāṁpaḍe Ugidettuva dāḍi bisurvva bālavāṁtara rudhirāṁbuvaṁ kuḍiva nālage siṁhaṇaneṁba rāyakēsariya gabhīraghōraghana cikkana sūnu bī
cayaṁ . Antu siṁhaṇana sarvvāṁgasaktiyuṁ svāmibhaktiyuṁ tanagaḷaṁkritamāge dvitīyanārāyaṇanuṁ caturōpāyaparāyaṇanuvenisida
1) The letter ta is written above the line.

bīcidēvadaṁḍanāthacūḍāmaṇi saptāṁgarājyalakṣmīnivāpadaṁteseva dakṣiṇarāyarāja dhāni huligeṟeya nelevīḍinoḷu samastasukhasaṁkathāvi
nōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire . bhāvanidhi dharmmasēnatraividyadēvarakhiḷajanamunijana rājīvavikāsadineseva trividhadaggaḷipa tējadiṁ tribhuvanamaṁ .
Ā dharmmasēnatraividyādharabratiparagraśiṣyanidhānaṁ bōdhanidhi kamaḻasēnatapōdhanaṟa vikhyātanoḷpanē varṇnipudu . Ā paramārtthasēnagaṇavārddhihima
dviti mūlasaṁghalakṣmīpuḻakōdamaṁ pogarigaccha mahōtsavamaṁgaḷōdakaṁ śrī purapāriśvanāthacaraṇānvayadunnativettanī tapa
śrīparipāḻaka kamaḷasēnajinabrativaṁśabhūśaṇaṁ . Antu negaḻteyaṁ pogaḻteyaṁ paḍeda kamaḷasēnabhaṭṭārakadēvara tapaścaraṇaparijānñanasamādhānameṁteṁdo
ḍe . vri . nāḍe guṇabratābharaṇasayyamatuṁgataraṁgadiṁde kaigūḍida sīlaphēna pari pāṁḍuravrittiyanānta sōbheyaṁ sōḍi tapōviḷāsavatiyuṁ sale bhārati
yuṁ sadā jaḷakrīḍeyanāḍuvarkamaḷasēnana śāṁtarasapravāhadoḷu . Antu malladeyū . suravallīlatikālavitranatuḻaṁ krōḍācaḷānīkabhīkaravajraṁ
ghanalōbhamōghasamitījaṁjhānimōḻahasiṁdhurapaṁcāsyanaghāvanīruhakuṭhāraṁ dī kamaḻasēnācāryyacakrēśvaraṁ . va . ©
Ā samastabhabyajanābhivaṁditapadakamaḻaṁ kamaḻīsenabhaṭṭārakadēvarakhiḻadharāvaḷeyaviḷasita divyatīrtthabhivaṁdanānimitta vihārisutta baṁdū .
ka . neṭṭane jaṁbūdvipakkiṭṭaḷa hagaraṭagenāḍu nosalā nosaliṁgiṭṭeseva tiḻakadaṁtire paṭṭaṇa vidu rāyamaḻige kalukeṟeyaseguṁ . Adalladevuṁ .
damadiravidu dānada tavarmmane dharmmada janmabhūmi nītiya nijadāgara mahiyāgarakuttama bhabyakōṭiya manameccu maccuvolanneṁbanne
gaṁ sogayippudī dharitriyoḻatiśōbheyiṁ sobaganāntu kalukeṟe Eṁba paṭṭaṇaṁ . Aṁteseva dibyatīrtthasthaḻa kalukeṟeyoḷaśēśabhavyajana
cūḍāmaṇi śrīdharmmarakṣāmaṇi pāyiseṭṭiyarggaṁ Avana tīrtthakapratiṣṭheya caityālayamaṁ sumuhūrttadiṁ nirmmisuvudeṁdu besase
tadgurūpadēśavākyamanuttamāṁgadoḷāṁta mahimanātana kulānvayaprabhāvameṁ teṁdoḍe . vri . vadanaviśōgranalladahivaṁśajanalladavaṁ dvijihva
nallada gativakranallada gataśritanallada śūnyakarṇnanallada jalavāsanalladaniḷāsananallada nāgadēvanabhyudayaviḷāsi roḍḍamaneyanvayadanvitabōsi
huṭvidaṁ . kaṁ . Antudayisida budhajanacintāmaṇiyāgi nāgiseṭṭiyara kānta nene vaiśya guṇaśrēṣṭhagōtranamaḷacaritraṁ . Ātana pi
riya maga hrijjātōpamarūpanakhiḻabhavyōttama vikhyātanātanaruhatpādāṁbujātō rjjitadharmmanenisida guṇavarmmaṁ . kuladabhivṛddhi māṁtanada
buddhi manōrathasiddhiyaṁ mūruṁ tolagada peṁpuṁ bāgyada dharmmadoḷava nalaviṁda sa
le taledūgisito guṇavarmmana sarvvaguṇaṁ dharitriyaṁ . Ā guṇavammanēṁ maṁtrige tavarmmaneyenippa pu(ṁ)ṇyōdaya doḻurbbareyaṁ sa
le harisidaṁ pāṣanamaḻasamyagdharmmaṁ . Avarirvvaroḻage piriyaṁ vividhaguṇābharaṇaguṇa manātana sati bhūbhuvanavinute sati
bhavanalakṣmi sōmaleyeṁbaḻu . vitataguṇavarmmaneṁnaya pati nākaṇanāci kaḻparu sutarudayisuvaṁdacaḻavara guṇacāritre
paḍedaḷa rddayadiṁ . janatāsaṁstutanāda nākanatiharṣaṁ pārdanatyaṁtaśāṁtana viśrāntanamōghavācanavolā kāntaraṁganaviśaṁkanudāra
nāmanabhirāmaṁ nēmaneṁbarmahātaneyarppuṭpidaralte seṭṭi guṇavarmma . Antanibariṁ piriyaṁ nākiseṭṭiyara mahimeyeṁteṁdaḍe .
tanage parōpakāracarita tanuvāge janāṁghribhaktibhāvaneyaṁ nijavacanaṁ vineyavritti pitrārjjitavritti satya nija
priyeyeṁba negaḻte lōkamōhanilenisittu vaiśyakasikhāmaṇi nākanadēṁ guṇāḍhyanō . va . Ātana kaḻatranidhāneyu patihitakaraṇa yuṁ
paramajinacaraṇakamaḷārccitapārijāteyuṁ satpātradānasanmāneyumenisida bācauvveya guṇakathanaveṁteṁdaḍe . vri . Ā guṇavarmmanagrasuta nā
(na)kana vallabheyīke saṁpadakkāgaravīke matiyīke patibrateyīke peṁpiniṁ śrīgeṇeyīke dānanidhiyīke dayāpareyīke yeṁdiḷābhāgadoḻirddu
dēvarīke bācabeyaṁte nalvāṁta na sudhājaladhiyiṁdudayisida tyudāra pārijāta harīśvadēvasaṁtānōpamānāgaṇyapuṇya
phalasaṁtānābhivṛddhikaraṇakāraṇatanūbhavarāreṁdaḍe . vri . hitavarmmaṁ guṇavarmmana pratimaśauṁḍacauṁḍanugrāhanirjjitaśauryyaṁ vijayaṇanuttama
caritraka pāyyanatyaṁtaśāntateyaṁ tāldidanātana kiṟiya tamma śāntaneṁbayvaraṁ sutaraṁ pettanidēṁ kritārtthano jagaprakhyātaroḻu nākaṇaṁ . va . Antu
Ayvartanūbhavaro ghanacāritrōjvaḷaratnatrayābharaṇanuṁ samāyatasadā nēkajinamunicaraṇanu ranarā
naraṁgadhvātāpaharaṇōddhatadēdīpyamānānantajinavaraśrīpadanakhakiraṇanuṁ jinasamaya samuddharaṇanumenisida pāyaseṭṭiya tamma sāṁta
na guṇāvaḷiyeṁteṁdaḍe . vri . sakaḷaguṇabratātiśayaneṁba caritranidhānaneṁba tīrtthakara kumāraneṁba ratunatrayabhūṣaṇaneṁba martyamāṇi
kanivaneṁba bhabyamukhadarppaṇaneṁba kuvaravaṁśadīpakanivaneṁba peṁpu nākana sūnu śāntanoḻu . va . Ataniṁ piriyaḻa pūrvvaguṇābharaṇe yāreṁdaḍe .
. ka . durmmatavirakte sati sāsirmmadharmānukūle subrataguṇade nirmmaḻacaritreyeṁ bī permmege sōmavveyaṁte nōṁtavaroḷare . ta . Antirvvariṁda piriyananantaji
nakramasarōjamadhukaranenalatyaṁtasubhacarita pāyyanane tānuṁ paḍeda pitana janmave saphaḻaṁ . vri . vodavida bhaktiyiṁ janakanarccisi dibyajināṁghriyugaḷapaduḷa
dinetti jainamunituṣṭigaḻaṁ neṟe māḍi dharmmadoḷā sadamaḻanāgi vartisi purārjjitapuṇyadoḻemma nākanallada manujarparārtthanidhi pāyiganaṁ pa
ḍeyalu samartthare . va . Ātana kulānvayapavitrīkaraṇakāraṇa kaḷatrabharaṇe yāreṁdaḍe . ka . muṁnave jaṁbūdvīpaṁ tānenisugu pāyyanamama pāyya
leyamritāṁbōnidhi surataru pādadānāvrite kalpalatike pāyaleyalte . vri . guṇa voṁdirvara rūpadoṁdeṟakavoṁdāḷāpavādaṁge lakṣaṇavoṁdāṁtaca
ritra vādaudāryavoṁdoṁde sayiraṇavoṁdoṁdida dharmmavoṁdu pesaroṁ deṁto vidhātraṁ maṁtaṇeyaṁ māḍidanayya pāyyaleyoḷātmasthāyyana pāyya
naṁ . va . Antagaṇyapuṇyōdayanenisida pāyyanaṁ paḍedu nākiseṭṭi rāyadaṁḍanātha bīcanudarasthāyyanaṁ māḍaloḍaṁ magaṁ baḍedaṁte rāja
śrēṣṭhi paṭṭama kaṭṭidaṁ . vri . rāyārūḍhacaritra bīcanudarōtpattitvamaṁ dharmma doṁdāyuṁ śrīyenipēḷgeya kamaḻasēnānugrahōdyaduyaśaśrīyaṁ bhabyajana
prasaṁgaphaḷanēṁ māḍittu kaḷvāṁtarasthāyi kīrttigavāryyanabhyudaya sāmūhika kautūhaḻa . Ā nuta sārṅgapāṇiparamēśavarasthirarāyarājyasa
ntānavadā pratāpanidhi siṁghaṇanātana bāhuśauryyasantānavadā negaḷda kali bīceya nātana kūrppu dharmma santānavadārkkubērakuḷapāvana pāyanadēṁ kritā
rtthanō . sutanī pāyanoḍarcci māḍuva bīcanuṁtana bīcanasauryyaduṁnatiyeṁteṁdu siṁghaṇaṁganvitāyatasiṁhāsanacāmarapra
bhūte yēkachatravā chatradiṁ sale dharitri gaḍaniṁnēvaṇnipaṁ baṇnipaṁ . vri . Uṟipaḻivādudī kamaḷasēnamunīṁdragurūpadēśavaṁ baḻikeya ka
ḷpabhūja Uditōditanirmmaḷadharmmalakṣmiya(iṁ)neṟadudu nityavāyi tama satya siḷākṣaramūrttikīrtti kaṇdeṟadu nōḍa bīcana tanūbhava pāyana puṇyadēḷgeyoḷu .
Amaḷanapārgge niṁdapudu nilvaḍe kīrttiye nilkumeṁdu neṭṭane tanuva jinēṁdrapathadoḷu janamaṁ mige dharmmadoḷu jagajjana taledūge nirmmisi negaḷte pogaḷtege nōṁtese
yipā bīcana suta pāyyanallada manuśyarigī yugadali tīrvvudē . va . Antā dharmma viraktanuṁ saddharmmayuktanāgi . ka . guru kamaḷasēna jinamunivaranolaviṁ besa
se taṁde bīcaṁgāyuṁ siriyanodavisuva matiyiṁ paramātthavanaṁtatīrtthakasthāpanavaṁ māḍi . vri . yidu saṁsārasamudrasētuvidu nirvvāṇaikaniśrēṇiyiṁtidu
rmmaṁgaḷa kaṇge hadharmmārtthabhaṁḍāraviṁtidu bhavyavaha sēbyadarppaṇavenippā rūḍhiya māḍidaṁ viditānantajinēṁdramaṁdiraviḷāsasthāiyaṁpāyiyaṁ . Antu
dharmapratipāḻakaṁ nijabhujaparākramōṁnatanāreṁdaḍe . vri . baḷavadarātimaṁḍaḷikamastaka sūlanudagravairimaṁḍaḷikamadēbhakēsari madōddhatamaṁḍaḷikā
caḷēṁdrasaṁkuḷakuḷiśāyudhaṁ birudamaṁḍaḷikārṇnavaghōrabāḍavānaḷanahitōgramaṁḍa ḷikabhairava vēsugidēva bhūbhujaṁ . © . svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya dhyā
nadhāraṇamōnuṣṭhānaparāyaṇaruṁ japatapasamādhisīlādyanēkaguṇasaṁpannaru yaupāsa nāgnihōtra dvijagurudēvatāpūjātatpararuṁ mākaṁdō
jvaḷakīrttiyutaruṁ yajanayājanādhyayanādhyāpanadānapratigrahaśaṭkarmmaniyataruṁ rugyajussāmātharvvaṇacaturvēdavvēdārtthapramāṇapravīṇaruṁ sarasvatīka
rṇnakuṁḍaḷābharaṇaruṁ Āśritabudhajanakaḷpavrikṣarumappa kāḷimayyadaṁḍanāyakara dati śrīmatu sarvvanamasyaduttamadagrahāra kalukeṟeya mahā
prabhugaḷu mukhyavāgi mūnūrvvaru mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ Ā maṁneya Ī nāḍa seṭṭigutta cauḍiseṭṭiyaru mukhyavāgi muṁmuridaṁḍaṁgaḷu samucitē
kasthānarāgidda samayadalu rāyapradhāni mallanuṁ bīcaṇanuṁ magaṁ pāyiseṭṭi mukhya vāgi sakaḷa bhabyajanaṁgaḷu nōṁpi nimittavāgi māḍisida śrīmadananta
tīrtthadēvara Aṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga nityanaimittikamahābhiśēka pūjādi caturvvidhi dāna sanmāna khaṁḍaspuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakyeṁdu śakavarṣada 1167 neya krōdhi
saṁvatsarada bhādrapada śuddha 14 Ādivāra byatīpāta puṇyadinadalā prathamasthaḷada madhyakada bhūmiyoḷage Ā sthaḷada prabhugaḷmukhyavāgi mahā
janaṁgaḷige pūjeya koṭṭu sakaḷānumatiyiṁda mūlasthānadēvara dattiyōpādiyāgi sarvvanamasyaveṁdu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi paḍeda kayya sthaḷanirddē
śavāvuvudeṁdaḍe vūriṁ teṁkalu tuṁbigeya baṭṭeyiṁda paḍuvalu narasiṁhadēvarakeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalā mallināthadēvara keyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu Aṟavaṭigeya keIṁ
daṁ teṁkalu Aḷadikkida māṇikēsvarada kōla mattaru haṁneraḍu 12 nivēśaṇa mallināthadēvara dānasāleyiṁ cikkakāceyana maneyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu gavaniyiṁdaṁ mūḍa
lu yekhyeyagala yippateṁṭu kayya nīḷada dānasāle nivēśaṇavoṁdu gāṇa gāṇakkarddharddha yaṇne . © . śrīmadiṁguḷigeya mahāprabhu muṭṭarasanu taṁna Ananta
dēvara nōṁpi Udyāpane nimittavāgi koṭṭa mattaruṟu pāyiseṭṭiyaru koṭṭu haḍada mattarāṟu sthaḷanirddēśavāvudeṁdaḍe kalukeṟeya baṭṭe
yiṁdaṁ teṁkalu bhōgiseṭṭiya keyiṁdaṁ mūḍalaḷadikkida māṇikēśvarada kola mattaru 12 tiḷuguḷada prabhuviṁge koṭṭu haḍada hūdōṁṭa
mattaroṁdu 1 haṁnikayya nivēśaṇavoṁdu . kramadinasaṁkhyāta nālku mahāmana sahita jōgavaddigeya caṁdramahītaḷauḷḷanegavamaḷaguṇarkkamaḷasēnadēva
rggoṁḍaru . Amarddire paṁcamahāśabdamanī caityālayakkasaṁkhyātarnnālku mahāmane verasi sthaḷadamaḷatapōdhanaruvittu pūjisikoṁḍaru . © . kṣōṇī
madhyadoḷaṁkuraṁ negarddudurbbīlōkavidvajjanaśrēṇīhastataḷaṁgaḷalli phaḷamāytā śādhināṁthāṁganāvēṇībhārada mēle pūtudamamā kāilli hūva
llidēṁ jāṇme bīcana sūnu pāyyana yēśōvalli latāḍaṁbaraṁ . ka . dhareyaṟeye bīcidēvana varasuta pāyigana dharmmasā(ṁ)mrājyada meysiri karuvina kavi kannaḍasa
rasati viracisidaṁ dēvanī śāsanamaṁ . kalyāṇada rāyarūvāri ballōja kaṁḍarisida sāsana maṁgaḷa mahā śrī . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirvvaruṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krīmi . dānapālanayōrmmadhdhyē dānā pittayana tippi pālanaṁ dānāsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .This is a mistake fordānācchreyōnu.
Digital edition of SII 20.202 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
